# Support

Need help with XD-oss-stack? Here are your options:

## Community Support

| Channel | Link |
|---------|------|
| 💬 Slack | [Join our Slack](https://xplurdata.slack.com/join/shared_invite/zt-3ztbx9k5e-ZAqInDjoyoICfB2ohq9NsQ#/shared-invite/email) |
| 💼 LinkedIn | [xplurdata](https://www.linkedin.com/company/xplurdata) |
| 🌐 Website | [xplurdata.com](https://www.xplurdata.com) |

## Bug Reports & Feature Requests

Use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/xplurdata/oss-stack/issues) for:
- Bug reports
- Feature requests
- Documentation improvements

## Security Vulnerabilities

**Do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.**
See [SECURITY.md](.github/SECURITY.md) for responsible disclosure.
